scripts.dev: npm --workspace shared run build && npm run dev:db:up && concurrently -k -n server,client,db -c blue,magenta,yellow "npm:dev:server" "npm:dev:client" "npm:dev:db:logs"
scripts.dev:db:up: docker compose up -d --wait postgres redis && npm run migrate
scripts.build: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace client run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace shared run typecheck && npm --workspace server run typecheck && npm --workspace client run typecheck
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:up && npm run migrate
